---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug in AProVE and help us reproduce it
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

## Summary

Describe the bug in one or two sentences.

## Impact

What is currently broken?
What did this prevent you from doing?

## Steps To Reproduce

Provide the smallest possible sequence of steps that reproduces the issue.

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

### Expected Result

Describe what you expected AProVE to do.

### Actual Result

Describe what AProVE did instead.
Include the full error message, wrong proof result, crash output, or unexpected behavior.

### Reproducibility

- [ ] I can reproduce this consistently
- [ ] I can reproduce this only sometimes
- [ ] I have included all files, inputs, or commands needed to reproduce it

## Environment

Please fill in what you know.

- AProVE version:
- Installation method: web interface / release jar / Docker image
- OS: macOS / Linux / Windows
- Solver or backend involved, if relevant:

## Input And Output

If the issue is related to analyzing a program or proof result, include the following.

- Minimal input program or example:
- Command, configuration, or options used:
- AProVE output or proof trace:

## Additional Context

Add anything else that would help us investigate, including whether this worked in an earlier version.
